message:
fix(e2e): add workflow path to PR trigger, deduplicate artifact uploads

Two issues found during second review pass:

1. The pull_request trigger was missing '.github/workflows/e2e-tests.yml'
   in its paths filter. Changes to the E2E workflow itself would not
   trigger the E2E tests on the PR, only on push to main — meaning
   workflow changes couldn't be validated before merging.

2. The e2e-logs artifact included both target/e2e-logs/ AND
   target/e2e-reports/, while e2e-reports was also uploaded as its own
   separate artifact. The reports directory was duplicated across two
   artifacts. Removed target/e2e-reports/ from e2e-logs so each artifact
   contains only its own content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ on:
       - 'scripts/e2e/**'
       - 'Cargo.toml'
       - 'Cargo.lock'
+      - '.github/workflows/e2e-tests.yml'
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 concurrency:
@@ -90,9 +91,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: e2e-logs
-          path: |
-            target/e2e-logs/
-            target/e2e-reports/
+          path: target/e2e-logs/
           retention-days: 7
 
       - name: Upload test reports
